description:
A Git client for simultaneous branches on top of your existing workflow.


## Changes
- Improves the performance of the "update workspace" action
- Fixes a condition under which "update workspace" never completes

Note: The last couple of releases have a mention of this regression - We do apologize for this. The offending feature that causes this has been taken out and we will approach these changes with more caution moving forward.
